content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Addressed both pending amendments. (1) Added a debug_assert! to unique_terminal_replay_match (fs.rs:2810) enforcing that when requested_run_id is Some, requested_started_at must also be Some — this prevents future callers from bypassing the started_at guard on runless terminal candidates. Also added a doc-comment contract on the function documenting this invariant. (2) Added a doc-comment on json_fill_none (fs.rs:2289) documenting that all Option fields on structs passed to it MUST use #[serde(default, skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")] — without this, None serializes as an explicit JSON null (key present), and the overlay's non-null value will not fill it. Added a direct test json_fill_none_fills_absent_option_from_overlay that verifies both the fill path (None base → Some overlay fills) and the preservation path (Some base → Some overlay preserves base).

## Steps

1. [Completed] Amendment 1: Added doc-comment contract on unique_terminal_replay_match (fs.rs:2797) stating that when requested_run_id is Some, requested_started_at must also be Some to enforce the started_at guard on runless terminal candidates
2. [Completed] Amendment 1: Added debug_assert!(requested_run_id.is_none() || requested_started_at.is_some()) at the top of unique_terminal_replay_match (fs.rs:2810) to enforce the invariant at runtime in debug builds, preventing future callers from passing (Some(run_id), None) which would bypass the guard
3. [Completed] Amendment 2: Added doc-comment on json_fill_none (fs.rs:2289) documenting the skip_serializing_if requirement: all Option fields on structs passed to this function MUST use #[serde(default, skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")] — otherwise None serializes as explicit JSON null (key present) and the overlay's non-null value will not fill it
4. [Completed] Amendment 2: Added test json_fill_none_fills_absent_option_from_overlay in fs.rs test module that directly verifies: (a) json_fill_none fills None optional fields from overlay's Some values, (b) existing base values are NOT overwritten when both sides are present
5. [Completed] Ran cargo test (683 unit passed, 0 failed), cargo clippy -- -D warnings (clean), cargo fmt --check (only pre-existing drift in agent_execution_test.rs)

## Validation Evidence

- cargo test: 683 unit tests passed, 0 failed; full test suite clean
- cargo clippy -- -D warnings: no warnings or errors
- cargo fmt --check: src/adapters/fs.rs clean; only pre-existing formatting diffs in unrelated tests/unit/agent_execution_test.rs
- debug_assert! at fs.rs:2810 fires on (Some(run_id), None) in debug builds, catching any future call site that would bypass the started_at guard. Current call sites pass (Some, Some) and (None, None), both satisfying the invariant
- json_fill_none doc-comment explicitly states the skip_serializing_if contract, making the implicit serde dependency visible to future maintainers adding fields
- json_fill_none_fills_absent_option_from_overlay: verifies base with run_id=None, plan_hash=None + overlay with run_id=Some('run-42'), plan_hash=Some('hash-abc') → merged has both filled; also verifies base with existing values is NOT overwritten by overlay
- All prior round tests continue to pass: terminal_replay_after_plan_evolution_succeeds, runless_match_rejected_when_started_at_mismatches, start_replay_after_plan_evolution_does_not_conflict, legacy_open_row_without_plan_hash_not_mislabeled_after_plan_evolution, terminal_replay_legacy_row_without_plan_hash_stays_unset, terminal_runless_replay_rejected_when_started_at_mismatches, journal_merge_fills_all_optional_fields, plan_hash_auto_populated_from_snapshot, explicit_plan_hash_takes_precedence_over_snapshot, runless_start_completed_with_named_run_id, completion_with_conflicting_plan_hash_rejects_runless_match, start_journal_details_round_trips_with_model_render, completion_journal_details_round_trips_with_model_render

## Outstanding Risks

- Pre-existing formatting drift in tests/unit/agent_execution_test.rs is unrelated to these changes but will appear in cargo fmt --check across the full workspace.
